summary: UI/UX Redesign Verification Complete - All features working after dark cosmic theme redesign. Login page renders with glass card, cosmic background, branding elements. HOD and Student logins work correctly. Dashboard shows sidebar with navigation. Coverage page loads with department overview and stat cards. Sign Out functionality works. Backend APIs (academic-coverage, generate-preview) return valid data with correct departmentId filtering.
critical_code_review_comments: Login page has all required data-testid attributes (login-page, login-card, login-school-code, login-email, login-password, login-submit-button)
AppShell correctly wraps authenticated routes with sidebar + topbar layout
Dark cosmic theme applied consistently across all pages
Sidebar navigation items correctly filtered by user role (HOD sees 9 items, Student sees 2 items)
Department selector visible in top bar for HOD users
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX redesign verified. Dark cosmic theme with glassmorphism working. All login flows (HOD, Student) working. Sidebar navigation working with role-based filtering. Academic Coverage Dashboard loads correctly with stat cards and section breakdowns. Paper generation API returns questions with correct departmentId. Sign Out functionality working.

elements_verified: data-testid attributes on all form elements
Sign In button with gradient styling

backend_api_academic_coverage.returns: Valid coverage data with sections, lessons, topics
